appliedUpdates.description: Documented that Clerk/PAT challenge behavior persisted during conversion milestone user-testing and blocked all authenticated assertion groups (conversion, recipes, pantry, cross-flows).

orchestratorOverride.reason: User explicitly approved skipping Clerk-authenticated end-to-end browser validation and assuming Clerk works in this environment.
orchestratorOverride.effect: Authenticated browser assertions were removed from the active validation contract; only public and unauthenticated assertions remain required for mission completion.
